creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next trip to @thedubaimall! ❤️

Love to immerse in Asian culture without leaving Dubai? The newly-opened Chinatown inside Dubai Mall is a must-visit!

Here are the things we love so far:

🍗 Hawker Chan: famous for the most affordable Michelin Starred meal in the world! We super love the Soya Sauce Chicken Rice (24.50 AED) that we went back to order more for takeaway! 

🐼 An instagrammable giant panda

🧮 Oriental pieces in every corner! There are rickshaws, lanterns, pagodas, and I even spotted an abacus!

🔆 Bright neon lights that reminded me Hong Kong!

🍱 Beautiful food court dedicated to authentic Asian cuisine! 

Have you been? What’s your fave in Chinatown?

👗 @jenni_wears
